message:
fix: add server-side WebSocket ping to prevent idle disconnects (#3179)

The 90s idle read deadline was causing "Connection lost" because the
frontend never sends pings. Now the server sends WebSocket-level ping
frames every 30s; browsers automatically respond with pongs, which
reset the read deadline. Truly idle connections (no browser) still
get cleaned up after 90s.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
